---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Talks, workshops, and other events"
description-meta: "Talks, workshops, and other events"
listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 100
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - .
#page-layout: full
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#events}
:::
